compiled_state.title: Test gate pre-commit hook times out — compute-diff-hash.sh takes ~8s of 10s budget
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: compute-diff-hash.sh takes ~8s, leaving only ~2s for the test gate logic within its 10s timeout. The gtimeout wrapper exits 124 on kill, overriding the test gate's fail-open trap (exit 0). Workaround: use COMPUTE_DIFF_HASH_OVERRIDE with a pre-computed hash. Fix: either increase the test gate timeout to 20s or optimize compute-diff-hash.sh.

comments.body: INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: safeguard_approval | Behavioral code bug: test gate hook timeout. Fix requires editing plugins/dso/hooks/ or scripts/ (safeguard). Re-run in interactive session to approve.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). Partial fix applied (timeout raised 10s→30s). Root cause: compute-diff-hash.sh performance.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
